title: Cohere Chat Message
description: Represents a message in a Cohere Chat API conversation, including user prompts, assistant responses, system instructions, and tool results.

role.description: The role of the message author in the conversation. User messages are prompts, assistant messages are model responses, system messages set behavior, and tool messages return function results.

content.description: The text content of the message.

tool_call_id.description: The ID of the tool call this message is responding to. Required when role is tool.

tool_calls.description: Tool calls generated by the model when it decides to invoke available functions.

citations.description: Citations referencing source documents used in retrieval-augmented generation.

ToolCall.description: A tool call generated by the model requesting execution of a specified function.

id.description: The unique identifier for this tool call.

type.description: The type of tool call. Currently only function is supported.

function.description: The function to call with its arguments.

name.description: The name of the function to call.

arguments.description: The arguments to pass to the function, serialized as a JSON string.

Citation.description: A citation referencing source content used in generating a response.

start.description: The start index of the cited text span in the response.

end.description: The end index of the cited text span in the response.

text.description: The cited text from the response.

document_ids.description: The IDs of the source documents referenced by this citation.
